name: ExtensionClinicalImpression_ChangePattern
title: R5: Change in the status/pattern of a subject's condition since previously assessed, such as worsening, improving, or no change (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ClinicalImpression.changePattern` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` has a context of ClinicalImpression based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ClinicalImpression`.
Element `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Change in the status/pattern of a subject's condition since previously assessed, such as worsening, improving, or no change (new)
element.comment:

Element `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Change in the status/pattern of a subject's condition since previously assessed, such as worsening, improving, or no change
element.definition: Change in the status/pattern of a subject's condition since previously assessed, such as worsening, improving, or no change.  It is a subjective assessment of the direction of the change.
